[cron:637ecb12-eae2-4c16-b174-8acdaa2729cc AInchors Task Monitor (15min)] TASK_MONITOR: Use the exec tool to run: bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/task-collector.sh. If non-empty, use the exec tool to alert Ken via: bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/sovereign-alert.sh --source TASK --message "<summary>".
